title: South of the Border
writer: Betty Burbridge, Gerald Geraghty, Dorrell McGowan
actors: Gene Autry, Smiley Burnette, June Storey
plot: Federal Agent Gene Autry and his sidekick Frog are sent to Mexico to prevent foreign powers from gaining control of Mexican oil refineries and fomenting revolution among the Mexican people. Gene falls in love with Senorita Dolores...
